zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophia van Loon於1163年4月13日出生在比利時安特維爾梅倫時，她的父親Gerard II van Loon17歲，母親Adélaïde von Geldern24歲。她與Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特格利波爾根結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1231年11月18日在她的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophia van Loon于1163年4月13日出生在比利时安特維爾梅倫时，她的父亲Gerard II van Loon17岁，母亲Adélaïde von Geldern24岁。她与Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特格利波爾根结婚。他们至少是13个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1231年11月18日在她的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Loon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps a shortened form of Irish McGoohan, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuacháin or Mag Cuacháin, a patronymic from a byname from cuach ‘cuckoo’.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 阮, see   Ruan   3.

variants.name: Ruan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Xiu, Ying, Biao, Chao, Cheng, Guang, Guohua, Hua, Huiming, Jia, Jian Hua.  Spanish Jorge, Arnulfo, Arturo, Blanca, Carlos, Eduardo, Gregorio, Guillermo, Javier, Jesus, Jose, Josefina.
Irish and Scottish: variant of   Ruane  .
Spanish (Ruán): nickname from ruán ‘roan’ (a color of horses), a variant of Ruano .

nameMeanings.name: Sophia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Sophia van Loon was born on 13 April 1163, in Mechelen, Antwerp, Belgium, her father, Gerard II van Loon, was 17 and her mother, Adélaïde von Geldern, was 24. She married Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard in Grimbergen, Flemish Brabant, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 18 November 1231, in her hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophia van Loon est née le 13 avril 1163, à Malines, Anvers, Belgique, son père, Gerard II van Loon, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde von Geldern, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard à Grimbergen, Brabant Flamand, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 novembre 1231, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophia van Loon am 13. April 1163 in Mechelen, Antwerpen, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerard II van Loon 17 und ihre Mutter Adélaïde von Geldern 24. Sie hat in Grimbergen, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 13 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. November 1231 im Alter von 68 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia van Loon è nata il il 13 aprile 1163 nel Mechelen, Anversa, Belgio, sua padre, Gerard II van Loon, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Adélaïde von Geldern, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard nel Grimbergen, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 18 novembre 1231, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophia van Loonが1163年4月13日にベルギーアントウエルペンメチェレンで生まれた時，父Gerard II van Loonは17歳，母Adélaïde von Geldernは24歳であった。ベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントグリンバージェンでGraaf Wouter Berthout III Gerardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1231年11月18日に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sophia van Loon(이)가 1163년 4월 13일 벨기에 앤트워펜 미셸에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerard II van Loon(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adélaïde von Geldern(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 그림버겐에서 Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1231년 11월 18일 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.13 April 1163–18 November 1231: 1163 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 13–1231 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 18

pt.Berkel Enrodenrijs,,,,PAYS-BAS,: Berkel en Rodenrijs, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia van Loon nasceu em 13 de abril de 1163, em Mechelen, Antuérpia, Bélgica, seu pai, Gerard II van Loon, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde von Geldern, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard em Grimbergen, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de novembro de 1231, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ro.Berkel Enrodenrijs,,,,PAYS-BAS,: Berkel en Rodenrijs, Zuid-Holland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophia van Loon родилась 13 апреля 1163 г. в местности мечелен, антвирпен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Gerard II van Loon было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde von Geldern, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard в местности гримбиржен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 18 ноября 1231 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.13 April 1163–18 November 1231: 13 de abril de 1163–18 de noviembre de 1231
es.Berkel Enrodenrijs,,,,PAYS-BAS,: Berkel en Rodenrijs, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophia van Loon nació el 13 de abril de 1163, en Mechelen, Amberes, Bélgica, su papá, Gerard II van Loon, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Adélaïde von Geldern, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard en Grimbergen, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 13 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 18 de noviembre de 1231, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
